evidence.planner: Planner telemetry includes route expected_cost_bytes, selected expected_uncached bytes, cache state per local index, and phase-specific local index selections.

4.evidence: Measured queries report proof ledger complete with zero pending/failed shards; runtime tests cover no-match proof, failed shard refusal, and cancelled pending-ledger refusal.

evidence.note: Runtime local-index parse/decode uses query-term selective packed decoders; family-level tables retain full-decode diagnostics, while query-path tables gate the actual phase-selected hot path.
Packed binary light terms plus metadata JSON are used for query planning; packed binary light/body indexes are scored by the stateful Rust/WASM top-k retrieval session in the browser worker.

decision.reason: The browser runtime can consume Rust/WASM stateful score entries directly. On the full packed body workload, the Rust/WASM session score bridge was 0.175x the TypeScript selective retrieval kernel for the same artifact format, query set, and global top-k pruning state.

evidence.cache_invalidation_test: Changed content-hash artifact paths are treated as cold cache misses.

10.evidence: Smoke queries, task queries, measured cold queries, warm cache queries, and a negative query are represented when full report mode is used.
